features: 🎄❄️⛄️🎁Christmas Party Favors Set--The package includes 6 Christmas featuring christmas snowflakes designs. Each party favors measure 10 inches in length and 2.2 inches in diameter. They come packaged in a festive Christmas gift box, perfect for adding a touch of fun to your gatherings and parties.

🎄❄️⛄️🎁No Crackers No Chrismtas--Pull a cracker at Christmas dinner. Great fun for family and friends at Christmas and dinner parties.Unlike the usual christmas crakers filled with inferior and useless gadgets, our christmas crackers contains 6 different Christmas themed wind up toys with a piece of Racing Card. Use the wind up toys and racing card to race with friends or families,and enjoy this happy time with your family on a joyful and warm Christmas night banquet!

🎄❄️⛄️🎁Exquisite Festive Design--The Christmas party favors are decorated with various festive elements like Christmas candies, snowflakes and more to create an atmosphere of holiday, perfect for adding cheer to your Christmas table setting.and you can also hang them on your christmas tree to add the atmosphere in the christmas month

🎄❄️⛄️🎁Holiday Gift for Christmas Parties and Dinners--These Christmas holiday favors make perfect gifts for friends, children, loved ones, and coworkers. Ideal for Christmas parties, gatherings, or family dinners, they also serve as a charming festive centerpiece for any table
🎄❄️⛄️🎁Safe for Children--Our toys fillers and the gifts inside are made from high-quality, non-toxic materials, ensuring safety and peace of mind for all
